description_long: This house is a modern, multi-level residence set within a landscaped lot bordered by a row of trees and a rocky outcrop. The structure features clean, angular lines, flat roofs, and a mix of white and gray exterior finishes, with large windows providing ample natural light. The property includes a swimming pool in the backyard, surrounded by a patio and greenery, and is enclosed by a natural stone barrier on one side. The front of the house faces a tree-lined street, with a driveway and a main entrance that is visually prominent. The landscaping integrates both manicured lawns and rugged rock formations, creating a blend of natural and contemporary aesthetics. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces, privacy, and a strong connection to the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat roofs, large windows, and a landscaped lot featuring a pool, patio, and stone outcrop. The property is bordered by trees and blends contemporary architecture with natural elements.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from above the front, highlighting the tree-lined street, driveway, and the main entrance, with the rocky outcrop and backyard visible behind.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the house from the rear, emphasizing the extensive rocky outcrop, backyard, and the pool area, with the house partially obscured by the rocks.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a side perspective, showcasing the integration of the house with the rocky landscape, the pool, and the driveway along the tree-lined street.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the house from the front, focusing on the main entrance, driveway, and the row of trees along the street, with the pool and patio visible behind the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent main entry with a flat overhang, wide steps, and a minimalist door, set back from a paved driveway and framed by landscaping.
